svg.text: Train WMAE (ratchet) and Holdout WMAE across 67 eval runs · annotations call out the release that drove each delta
Lower is better · y-axis clipped at 14 min for readability (early v1.4.0 holdout pre-tz-fix peaked at 151 min)
